Welcome to UGIP

Uttarakhand Government Institute of Polytechnic is a premier technical education institute established in 1956. For over six decades, we have been committed to providing quality education and producing skilled professionals who contribute to nation-building.

Our institute offers diploma programs in various engineering disciplines and pharmacy, with state-of-the-art infrastructure, experienced faculty, and an industry-relevant curriculum. Located in the serene surroundings of Nainital, our campus provides an ideal learning environment.

Admission Info Our Departments

Our Vision & Mission

👁️

Our Vision

To be a center of excellence in technical education that nurtures innovation, creativity, and ethical values, producing skilled professionals who contribute to sustainable development and nation-building.

🎯

Our Mission

To provide quality technical education through innovative teaching methods, industry collaboration, and a research-oriented approach, fostering holistic development of students and preparing them for global challenges.

Our Core Values

🏆

Excellence

Striving for the highest standards in education, research, and innovation in every aspect of our work.

🤝

Integrity

Upholding ethical values and transparency in all our endeavors and relationships with stakeholders.

💡

Innovation

Encouraging creative thinking and problem-solving approaches to meet the challenges of tomorrow.

🌱

Sustainability

Promoting environmentally conscious practices and responsible use of resources in all activities.

🌍

Inclusivity

Ensuring equal opportunities for all students regardless of background, gender, or social status.

🔬

Research

Encouraging academic curiosity and applied research to solve real-world engineering challenges.

A.K.S. Gaurh

Principal, UGIP Nainital

Principal's Message

"Welcome to UGIP Nainital, where we transform lives through technical education."

Since our establishment in 1956, we have been committed to providing quality education that equips students with the skills and knowledge needed to excel in their chosen fields.

We believe in holistic development, encouraging our students to participate in extracurricular activities, technical festivals, and community service. Our alumni have made significant contributions across various industries, both nationally and internationally.

I invite you to explore our programs and discover how UGIP can help you build a successful career in engineering or pharmacy.

Our History

1956
Establishment
UGIP was established with a vision to provide quality technical education in the Kumaon region of Uttarakhand.
1960s
Expansion
New engineering departments were introduced to meet the growing demand for technical professionals in the region.
1980s
Infrastructure Development
Major expansion of campus infrastructure including modern labs and student hostels to accommodate more students.
2000s
Modernization
Introduction of modern computer labs, digital resources, and AICTE accreditation to meet national standards.
2026
Rebranding to UGIP
The institute was officially renamed to Uttarakhand Government Institute of Polytechnic, Nainital (UGIP) aligning with the modern SaaS era.
